title: Microsoft Exchange Message
description: Represents an email message in a user's mailbox as exposed through the Microsoft Graph Mail API. A message is contained within a mail folder and supports operations such as send, reply, forward, and delete.

id.description: Unique identifier for the message. By default, this value changes when the item is moved from one container to another.

body.description: The body of the message in HTML or text format

bodyPreview.description: The first 255 characters of the message body in text format

from.description: The owner of the mailbox from which the message is sent

sender.description: The account used to generate the message

toRecipients.description: The To: recipients for the message

ccRecipients.description: The Cc: recipients for the message

bccRecipients.description: The Bcc: recipients for the message

replyTo.description: The email addresses to use when replying

conversationId.description: The ID of the conversation the email belongs to

conversationIndex.description: Indicates the position of the message within the conversation

createdDateTime.description: The date and time the message was created in ISO 8601 UTC format

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the message was last changed

receivedDateTime.description: The date and time the message was received

sentDateTime.description: The date and time the message was sent

hasAttachments.description: Indicates whether the message has attachments (excludes inline attachments)

inferenceClassification.description: The classification of the message based on inferred relevance or importance

internetMessageId.description: The message ID in the format specified by RFC2822

internetMessageHeaders.description: A collection of message headers defined by RFC5322

isDeliveryReceiptRequested.description: Indicates whether a delivery receipt is requested

isDraft.description: Indicates whether the message is a draft

isRead.description: Indicates whether the message has been read

isReadReceiptRequested.description: Indicates whether a read receipt is requested

parentFolderId.description: The unique identifier for the message's parent mailFolder

webLink.description: The URL to open the message in Outlook on the web

flag.description: The follow-up flag status for the message

categories.description: The categories associated with the message

uniqueBody.description: The part of the body unique to the current message

emailAddress.description: The name and email address of a person or entity

name.description: The display name of the person or entity

internetMessageHeader.description: A key-value pair representing an Internet message header defined by RFC5322

name.description: The name of the message header

value.description: The value of the message header

flagStatus.description: The status of the follow-up flag

dateTimeTimeZone.description: Describes a date, time, and time zone

dateTime.description: A date and time combined in ISO 8601 format

timeZone.description: A time zone name (e.g. Pacific Standard Time)
